entry.title: New: RES26-142 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT 3,700 CULLS VALUED AT $3,700.00 TO THE CITY FROM ASAGI HATCHERY, INC. FOR ANIMAL CONSUMPTION.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-141 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF CASH IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000, TO THE CITY, FROM WELLCARE TO THE DEPARTMENT OF PARKS AND RECREATION FOR THE 55TH ANNUAL SENIOR CITIZENS’ VALENTINES DANCE ON FEBRUARY 6, 2026, AT THE NEAL S. BLAISDELL CENTER EXHIBITION HALL.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-140 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $659.60, TO THE CITY FROM THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI PLANNING DEPARTMENT FOR THREE DEPARTMENT OF PLANNING AND PERMITTING (DPP) EMPLOYEES TO PARTICIPATE AT THE REGIONAL PLANNING FOCUS GROUP IN HILO, HAWAIʻI, JUNE 10, 2026.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-139 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF $5,000 TO THE CITY FROM THE FRIENDS OF HAWAIʻI CHARITIES FOR THE UPKEEP AND MAINTENANCE OF KAHALA COMMUNITY PARK.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-143 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE APPOINTMENT OF LUCA CUNIBERTI TO SERVE ON THE RATE COMMISSION OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL034(26) (Honolulu): Returned approved.
entry.content:
RELATING TO FLOOD HAZARD AREAS.

Amends ROH Chapter 21A to update requirements and construction standards for consistency with the requirements of the FEMA, to remain eligible for participation in the National Flood Insurance Program and the Community Rating System, and make other housekeeping amendments. Takes effect on June 10, 2026.

Latest action: Returned approved.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: BILL043(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
TO REZONE LAND SITUATED AT PAʻALAʻA KAI, WAIALUA, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: BILL042(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
TO AMEND A PORTION OF THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT BOUNDARY MAP (KAHUKU QUADRANGLE) FROM THE AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO THE URBAN DISTRICT FOR CERTAIN LANDS SITUATED IN THE KOʻOLAU LOA DEVELOPMENT PLAN AREA, LĀ‘IE, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
